sections.paragraph: m. [Chemosh], pr.n. of a national god of the Moabites and Ammonites, Jud. 11:24 , worshipped also at Jerusalem in the reign of Solomon [after his wives had turned aside his heart]. 1Ki 11:7 2Ki 23:13 Jer 48:7 perhaps subduer, conqueror, tamer, from the root כָּמַשׁ, which see; hence עַם כְּמֹושׁ people of Chemosh, i.e. the Moabites, Num 21:29. LXX. Χαμώς. Vulg. Chamos.
